minimal.description: Small bug fixes and narrow changes with code evidence, scoped edits, base self-review, per-change metrics, and targeted verification.
minimal.qualityGate: Run base self-review, record CHANGE_METRICS, then run targeted tests or explain why no runnable test exists.

standard.description: Default product-to-test delivery workflow for normal product requirements, with base self-review and optional project consistency governance.
standard.qualityGate: Implementation plan and test plan must be confirmed before coding; self-review and verification evidence are required before review.

strict.description: High-risk workflow for auth, money, orders, inventory, database migrations, concurrency, external integrations, or security-sensitive changes.
strict.qualityGate: Requires rollback plan, self-review, security review, database review when applicable, and recorded verification evidence.

learning.description: Post-delivery learning workflow for extracting reusable project-scoped instincts and promotion candidates.
learning.qualityGate: Every lesson must include trigger, evidence, metrics signal, reuse path, SOP candidate when applicable, and promotion recommendation.
